mapper.sql: comment_id, post_id, parent_comment_id, writer_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comments ORDER BY comment_id DESC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_comment_id, comment_id) ASC, parent_comment_id IS NOT NULL ASC, comment_id ASC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE writer_id = #{writerId} ORDER BY comment_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND writer_id = #{writerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE comments SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND writer_id = #{writerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
